title: NADE Regional and State Chapter Constitutions & Bylaws (Link Index)
description: A by-region (North, South, Midwest, Pacific) link index to the constitution-and-bylaws documents for NADE's state and local chapters, each entry pairing a chapter name and number with a link to its .doc/.docx bylaws file (most under nade.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/). Also links the Northeast Region constitution/bylaws. A few chapters (e.g., Mich Kalamazoo - 73, California Oak - 72) are listed without a document link. Scraped from the official NADE site.
geographic_coverage: United States (all states, DC, PR, VI, Guam)
update_cadence: as chapter bylaws documents are revised/re-posted
notes: Authoritative: direct capture of NADE's Regional Constitutions & Bylaws index page (source URL preserved). This is a link list of .doc/.docx bylaws documents (not in the format enum and NOT captured here as files). Most upload links are dated 2025-10, suggesting a late-2025 refresh, but no page-level date is stated so temporal_coverage is omitted. Mirrors the same region/chapter/number structure as the region-chapter-numbers directory.
